code:
import string

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut errors = ""
  mut count = 0
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = "empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count == 0
      errors = "negative-age"
    else
      errors = "#{errors},negative-age"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count == 0
      errors = "too-old"
    else
      errors = "#{errors},too-old"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    "ok"
  else
    "errors=#{errors}"
  end
end

fn report(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  print(validate(name, age))
end

report("", -5)
report("Alice", 30)
report("Bob", 200)
